case_title: BOAS INTERNATIONAL MTRS DBA SAN FRANCISCO HONDA VS QUINTANILLA, JULIO

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BOAS INTERNATIONAL MTRS DBA SAN FRANCISCO HONDA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT QUINTANILLA, JULIO $501.32 PRINCIPAL, $64.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $565.32, PAYMENT MUST BE MADE BY 10/17/97.
